title: More Golden Food
body:
All food in 1.0: Golden Beetroot, Golden Potato, Golden Glow Berries, Golden Steak, Golden Cooked Porkchop, Golden Cooked Mutton


![GoldenBeetroot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6308a0762759f5015fe6ba6ceeb747e7366a608a.png)
Golden Beetroot - 30 seconds of Haste 3

![GoldenPotato](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad3097ccf847bd667d2391be80accb8a5db86eda.png)
Golden Potato - 10 seconds of speed 3

![GoldenGlowBerries](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fded57f8a0dea154c4f6aa125eff0a87428d0ec.png)
Golden Glow Berries - 30 seconds of Night Vision 2

![GoldenCookedPorkchop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df8945943204956cb0f22cd2027005326692eff4.png)
Golden Cooked Porkchop - 15 seconds of Resistance 2

![GoldenCookedMutton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a010ad04715b4155607e00e32fb7f3a9e61ffd7.png)
Golden Cooked Mutton - 17 seconds of Jump Boost 3

![GoldenSteak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/480cc842f96ee0449c8d020126b8bd83cea43abc.png)
Golden Steak - 3 seconds of Regeneration 4
